user.title: Connect to BabyTracker
user.description:
Enter the URL of your BabyTracker instance and an API token (Settings → Integrations → API Tokens). Use 'read' permission for read-only sensors; 'write' is required for logging services and backup triggers.

For the HA add-on, find the container hostname in the Supervisor logs (look for `<hash>/amd64-addon-babytracker`) and use `http://<hash>-babytracker:8099`.

error.invalid_url: URL must include scheme and host (e.g. https://babytracker.local:8099).
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach BabyTracker. Check the URL and that the device is online.

abort.already_configured: This BabyTracker instance is already configured.

init.title: BabyTracker connection
init.description: Update the URL or API token for this integration. Changes take effect immediately.

error.invalid_url: URL must include scheme and host.

log_feeding.name: Log feeding
log_feeding.description: Record a feeding for a child.

device_id.name: Child
device_id.description: Pick the child this feeding belongs to.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: Volume in mL (only for bottles / pumped milk).

duration_minutes.name: Duration
duration_minutes.description: How long the feeding lasted. Leave empty for an instant event.

ended_at.name: Ended at
ended_at.description: When the feeding ended. Defaults to now if omitted.

log_sleep.name: Log sleep
log_sleep.description: Record a sleep period for a child.

ended_at.name: Ended at
ended_at.description: When the sleep ended. Defaults to now if omitted.

log_diaper.name: Log diaper change
log_diaper.description: Record a diaper change for a child.

color.name: Color
color.description: Color of stool. Only applied when Solid is ticked — ignored otherwise.

when.name: When
when.description: When the change happened. Defaults to now.

highlight.name: Highlight
highlight.description: A short one-liner about anything notable during this session. Not the same as logging a developmental milestone — use "Log milestone" for those.

amount.name: Amount
amount.description: How much was pumped, in mL.

duration_minutes.name: Duration
duration_minutes.description: How long the session lasted. Optional.

ended_at.name: Ended at
ended_at.description: When the session ended. Defaults to now if omitted.

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: Reading value. Units follow your BabyTracker setting (°C or °F). The range below covers both.

when.name: When
when.description: When the reading was taken. Defaults to now.

date.name: Date
date.description: When the milestone was reached. Defaults to today.

weight.name: Weight
weight.description: Value in your configured unit (kg or lb).

date.name: Date
date.description: When the measurement was taken. Defaults to today.

height.name: Height
height.description: Value in your configured unit (cm or in).

date.name: Date
date.description: When the measurement was taken. Defaults to today.

head_circumference.name: Head circumference
head_circumference.description: Value in your configured unit (cm or in).

date.name: Date
date.description: When the measurement was taken. Defaults to today.

start_timer.name: Start timer
start_timer.description: Start a timer (e.g. Sleep, Feeding, Tummy Time) for a child.

name.name: Timer name
name.description: Use a name that matches the activity, e.g. "Sleep" or "Feeding".

stop_timer.name: Stop timer
stop_timer.description: Stop a running timer for a child. If no name is given, all of this child's timers are stopped.

name.name: Timer name
name.description: Optional. Stops only timers with this exact name (case-insensitive).

set_slideshow.name: Picture frame slideshow
set_slideshow.description: Start or stop the slideshow on a connected display.

device.name: Display device name
device.description: Optional. Configured in BabyTracker → Settings → Device name. Omit to target all displays.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force the integration to immediately refresh sensor data from BabyTracker.

create_backup.name: Create backup
create_backup.description: Trigger a one-off BabyTracker backup. The archive is uploaded to every enabled destination, or only to the destinations you list. Encrypted destinations without a stored passphrase are skipped silently — use the BabyTracker UI for those.

destinations.name: Destination IDs
destinations.description: Optional list of destination IDs. Leave empty to target every enabled destination. Destination IDs can be seen in the BabyTracker Settings UI (or in the ID of each `backup_*` sensor device).
